code:
import io
import string

let line_opt = io.read_line()
let line = match line_opt
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut product = 1
mut i = 0
let n = string.len(line)
mut in_num = false
mut sign = 1
mut cur = 0

while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
    if in_num
      product = product * (sign * cur)
      in_num = false
      sign = 1
      cur = 0
    end
  else if b == 45 and not in_num
    sign = -1
    in_num = true
  else if b == 43 and not in_num
    sign = 1
    in_num = true
  else
    cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
    in_num = true
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if in_num
  product = product * (sign * cur)
end

println("product=#{product}")
